title: Muro: Nalet Olsun Içimdeki Insan Sevgisine
original_title: Muro: Nalet Olsun İçimdeki İnsan Sevgisine
overview: Muro spent years in prison for "organizing crime". After getting out of prison, Muro and Ceto return to their hometown to start the revolution from the village. Their first plan is get married, build a home, to be a model revolutionary…
